description: A clinical operations manager needs to identify and evaluate potential investigator sites for a new global oncology study.

nodes.task_description: Search an investigator database for oncologists with experience in Phase 2 lung cancer trials.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of 50 potential investigators.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the past performance of the potential sites, looking at patient enrollment rates and data quality metrics.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent filters the list down to 20 top-performing sites.

nodes.task_description: Send a feasibility questionnaire to the top 20 sites to gauge their interest and patient population.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the questionnaire to the selected sites.

nodes.task_description: Based on questionnaire responses, select the final 10 sites for the study.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes a final selection and updates their status in the Clinical Trial Management System (CTMS).
